channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th June
item.description:
ENWD with 3 way traffic lights plus fway closure cut back overgrown hedges back to boundary approx 20m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 8th June
item.description:
Broken chamber Cover & Frame 1 x 600mm x 600mm CI cover - take up and reset Further investigation may be required STAT PLAN REQUIRED Temporary road closure TM required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th June
item.description:
ENWD with 2 way stop and go plus fway closure cut back overgrown hedges back to boundary approx 12m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th June
item.description:
28day with 3 way stop and go CW pothole 1350x400x45mm perm repair unmarked (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th June
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge FW 4m x 1m Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Cut back from FW (Overgrown Hedge)
